productDisplayName: Baggit Women Valley Camlincrush Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This three-fold timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette and fabric has a flap style three-fold opening with press button closuresA buckle detail on the frontSix card holders, two pockets, a key holder and an id holder on the left foldFour card holders on the centre foldA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
